manifest.scope: exact short-hit bundle economics; not new search
manifest.hit_rule: reconstruct and verify only pre-existing exact hits
manifest.selection_rule: weighted non-overlap selection with layout-specific marginal cost

layouts.name: oracle-zero-record
layouts.description: Impossible lower bound: selected exact spans cost zero bytes.

layouts.name: seed-only-oracle
layouts.description: Impossible lower bound: seed payload is charged, offsets are free.

layouts.name: inline-seed-record
layouts.description: Current byte-heavy seed record cost: 4 + seed_len bytes per span.

layouts.name: global-u16-seed-delta-u16-offset
layouts.description: Global u16 seed index plus u16 offset deltas.

layouts.name: global-u32-seed-delta-uleb128-offset
layouts.description: Global u32 seed index plus ULEB128 offset deltas.

layouts.name: local-seed-dict-u8-ref-delta-u8-offset
layouts.description: Local u16 seed dictionary, u8 seed references, and u8 offset deltas.

layouts.name: local-seed-dict-u8-ref-delta-u16-offset
layouts.description: Local u16 seed dictionary, u8 seed references, and u16 offset deltas.

layouts.name: const-seed-delta-u8-offset
layouts.description: One constant seed per bundle, first offset u32, then u8 deltas.

layouts.name: const-seed-delta-u16-offset
layouts.description: One constant seed per bundle, first offset u32, then u16 deltas.

summary.conclusion: Exact short-hit bundling finds full-stream negative rows only under very compact constant-seed layouts, but controls remain comparable; do not promote this lane.
